questions.question: How is global fetch mocked in a composable test to avoid real network calls?
options: Set global.fetch = vi.fn() and configure responses per test
Use fetch.intercept() from Vitest's built-in network module
Wrap the composable call in a vi.isolate() block

questions.question: What state should loading.value have immediately after calling the composable (before the fetch resolves)?
options: false: loading only becomes true after the first failed request
null: it is unset until the fetch starts
undefined: it depends on the composable implementation

questions.question: Why is mockFetch.mockReset() called in beforeEach?
options: To re-register the mock with the global fetch API
To clear call history and configured responses so tests don't interfere with each other
To reset the loading state of the composable between tests
mockReset() is required before each vi.fn() usage by Vitest
